mapper.sql: goodsEvaluatId, goodsId, orderNo, userId, headImgUrl, nickname, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate
mapper.insert: insert into goods_evaluate (goodsEvaluatId, goodsId, userId, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate) values (#{goodsEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into goods_evaluate
goodsEvaluatId,
goodsId,
orderNo,
userId,
headImgUrl,
nickname,
evLevel,
evContent,
evaluatImgUrl,
evaluatDate,
#{goodsEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update goods_evaluate
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where goodsEvaluatId = #{goodsEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update goods_evaluate set goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, evLevel = #{evLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where goodsEvaluatId = #{goodsEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT goodsEvaluatId, goodsId, userId, evLevel, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate, headImgUrl, nickname from goods_evaluate g WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} ORDER BY evaluatDate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) from goods_evaluate g WHERE goodsId = #{goodsId} ORDER BY evaluatDate
mapper.insert:
insert into goods_evaluate (goodsId, orderNo, userId, headImgUrl,nickname,evLevel,evContent,evaluatImgUrl) values
( #{goodsEvaluate.goodsId}, #{goodsEvaluate.orderNo}, #{goodsEvaluate.userId}, #{goodsEvaluate.headImgUrl}, #{goodsEvaluate.nickname}, #{goodsEvaluate.evLevel}, #{goodsEvaluate.evContent}, #{goodsEvaluate.evaluatImgUrl} )
